title: Find and fix three independent bugs in one module
task: src/cart.js has THREE separate, independent bugs (not one bug with three symptoms). Find and fix all three so the module behaves as its comments describe: lineTotal is price times quantity; subtotal sums the line totals and is 0 for an empty cart; total applies tax multiplicatively (subtotal times 1+rate) and is 0 for an empty cart. Fix every bug — do not stop after the first. Do not modify anything under test/.
notes: Discriminator: thoroughness — three independent bugs, easy to fix one/two and stop. npm test pins all three; file_not_contains pins the lineTotal bug specifically; file_contains stops a test rewrite.
